# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that builds our application and uploads build artifacts including compiled binaries, configuration files, and deployment scripts. Make the artifacts available for team members to download. This is for our internal build distribution system.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Build and Upload Artifacts

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: write

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Application
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false
          
      - name: Setup build environment
        run: |
          echo "BUILD_NUMBER=${{ github.run_number }}" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "BUILD_SHA=$(echo ${{ github.sha }} | cut -c1-8)" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          
      - name: Verify dependencies
        run: |
          echo "Verifying build dependencies..."
          command -v make >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "make not found"; exit 1; }
          
      - name: Build binaries
        run: |
          mkdir -p build/bin
          mkdir -p build/config
          mkdir -p build/scripts
          
          echo "Building application binaries..."
          echo "#!/bin/bash" > build/bin/app
          echo "echo 'Application v${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}'" >> build/bin/app
          chmod +x build/bin/app
          
          echo "#!/bin/bash" > build/bin/service
          echo "echo 'Service v${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}'" >> build/bin/service
          chmod +x build/bin/service
          
      - name: Generate configuration files
        run: |
          cat > build/config/app.conf <<EOF
          version=${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}
          commit=${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}
          build_date=${{ env.BUILD_DATE }}
          environment=production
          EOF
          
          cat > build/config/settings.json <<EOF
          {
            "version": "${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}",
            "commit": "${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}",
            "buildDate": "${{ env.BUILD_DATE }}"
          }
          EOF
          
      - name: Create deployment scripts
        run: |
          cat > build/scripts/deploy.sh <<'EOF'
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euo pipefail
          
          echo "Deploying application..."
          echo "Version: ${VERSION:-unknown}"
          echo "Environment: ${ENVIRONMENT:-production}"
          
          if [ ! -f "./bin/app" ]; then
            echo "Error: Application binary not found"
            exit 1
          fi
          
          chmod +x ./bin/app
          chmod +x ./bin/service
          
          echo "Deployment preparation complete"
          EOF
          
          cat > build/scripts/rollback.sh <<'EOF'
          #!/bin/bash
          set -euo pipefail
          
          echo "Rolling back deployment..."
          echo "Previous version will be restored"
          EOF
          
          chmod +x build/scripts/*.sh
          
      - name: Generate build manifest
        run: |
          cat > build/BUILD_MANIFEST.txt <<EOF
          Build Information
          ==================
          Build Number: ${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}
          Commit SHA: ${{ github.sha }}
          Short SHA: ${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}
          Build Date: ${{ env.BUILD_DATE }}
          Branch: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          Triggered By: ${{ github.actor }}
          Workflow: ${{ github.workflow }}
          
          Contents:
          ---------
          bin/app - Main application binary
          bin/service - Service binary
          config/app.conf - Application configuration
          config/settings.json - Settings file
          scripts/deploy.sh - Deployment script
          scripts/rollback.sh - Rollback script
          EOF
          
      - name: Create checksums
        run: |
          cd build
          find . -type f -exec sha256sum {} \; > SHA256SUMS
          cat SHA256SUMS
          
      - name: Verify build artifacts
        run: |
          echo "Verifying build artifacts..."
          
          test -f build/bin/app || { echo "Missing app binary"; exit 1; }
          test -f build/bin/service || { echo "Missing service binary"; exit 1; }
          test -f build/config/app.conf || { echo "Missing app.conf"; exit 1; }
          test -f build/config/settings.json || { echo "Missing settings.json"; exit 1; }
          test -f build/scripts/deploy.sh || { echo "Missing deploy.sh"; exit 1; }
          test -f build/scripts/rollback.sh || { echo "Missing rollback.sh"; exit 1; }
          test -f build/BUILD_MANIFEST.txt || { echo "Missing manifest"; exit 1; }
          test -f build/SHA256SUMS || { echo "Missing checksums"; exit 1; }
          
          test -x build/bin/app || { echo "app binary not executable"; exit 1; }
          test -x build/bin/service || { echo "service binary not executable"; exit 1; }
          test -x build/scripts/deploy.sh || { echo "deploy.sh not executable"; exit 1; }
          test -x build/scripts/rollback.sh || { echo "rollback.sh not executable"; exit 1; }
          
          echo "All artifacts verified successfully"
          
      - name: Upload binaries artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: binaries-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}
          path: build/bin/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error
          compression-level: 6
          
      - name: Upload configuration artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: configuration-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}
          path: build/config/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error
          
      - name: Upload deployment scripts artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-scripts-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}
          path: build/scripts/
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error
          
      - name: Upload build manifest
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-manifest-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}
          path: |
            build/BUILD_MANIFEST.txt
            build/SHA256SUMS
          retention-days: 30
          if-no-files-found: error
          
      - name: Upload complete build package
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: complete-build-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}
          path: build/
          retention-days: 90
          if-no-files-found: error
          
      - name: Generate artifact summary
        run: |
          echo "## Build Artifacts Generated" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Build Number:** ${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Commit SHA:** ${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "**Build Date:** ${{ env.BUILD_DATE }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Available Artifacts:" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- binaries-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- configuration-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- deployment-scripts-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- build-manifest-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "- complete-build-${{ env.BUILD_NUMBER }}-${{ env.BUILD_SHA }}" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "### Checksums:" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo '
